brief_html: This message will give you data you need for SID_AUTH_ACCOUNTLOGON (0x53). You must send this before you can send BNLS_LOGONPROOF (0x03).
remarks_html: This message will give you data you need for SID_AUTH_ACCOUNTLOGON (0x53). You must send this before you can send BNLS_LOGONPROOF (0x03).
